overview.title: Overview
overview.verifyBanner: Your email isn't verified yet — verify it to unlock plan purchases.
overview.setupBody: Complete the guided steps to connect your store and go live.

getStarted.title: Get started
getStarted.welcome: Welcome! Finish these steps to go live.
getStarted.welcomeNamed: Welcome, {name}! Finish these steps to go live.
getStarted.allSet: You're all set → Go to dashboard

steps.verifyBody: Confirm your email to unlock plan purchases and secure your account.
steps.connectBody: Tell us where your storefront lives so we can index your catalogue.
steps.keysBody: Generate a sync key (catalogue import) and a widget key (storefront search + chat).
steps.widgetBody: Embed the search + chat widget on your storefront and match your brand.

catalog.intro: Connect your store so Vitrin can index your catalogue and keep it fresh via event-driven sync.
catalog.storeUrlHint: Where your storefront lives, e.g. https://shop.example.com
catalog.howStep1: Install the {platform} plugin and paste a sync-scoped API key.
catalog.howStep2: The plugin runs an initial bulk import, then posts a webhook on every product change.
catalog.howStep3: Only the delta is sent — prices, stock and new products stay fresh automatically.
catalog.resyncHint: A manual re-sync button appears here once a sync key has been used.

search.intro: Shape relevance with synonyms and learn what shoppers can't find.
search.synonymsHint: One rule per line — e.g. «laptop, notebook, لپ‌تاپ». Applied to Persian search.
search.zeroHint: High-demand queries with no matches — add products or a synonym rule.

assistant.intro: A grounded RAG assistant that answers only from your catalogue — no invented products.
assistant.greetingLabel: Opening message shown in the chat widget
assistant.greetingPlaceholder: سلام! چطور می‌تونم در پیدا کردن محصول کمکتون کنم؟
assistant.guardrail1: Answers are grounded in your synced catalogue only (no hallucinated products).
assistant.guardrail2: Prompt-injection defences and a release-blocking guardrail test protect every turn.
assistant.guardrail3: The cost ladder (cache → search → small model → large model) keeps spend low.
assistant.guardrail4: Out-of-scope questions are politely declined rather than answered from the open web.
assistant.guardrailsHint: Model routing & budget caps are managed by the platform AI gateway.

knowledge.intro: FAQ & policy articles the assistant can ground answers on — alongside your catalogue.
knowledge.empty: No articles yet — add FAQ or policy articles so the assistant can ground its answers on them.

analytics.intro: Relevance · latency · cost · reliability for your store.
analytics.zeroHint: Demand your catalogue isn't meeting — add products or synonyms.
analytics.insightEmpty: Not enough data for an insight yet.

chat.intro: How shoppers engage with the AI assistant.
chat.topicsHint: Most-discussed product queries from chat. Populated once the assistant serves live traffic (needs the inference profile + synced catalogue).

conversion.intro: Search → click → add-to-cart funnel. Powered by storefront events from the widget.
conversion.empty: No conversion events yet. Embed the widget and emit click / add-to-cart events to populate this funnel.

leads.intro: Contacts captured in-conversation by the assistant.
leads.empty: No leads yet — once your widget is live, the assistant captures shopper contacts during conversations.

widget.intro: Embed the search + chat widget and match it to your brand.
widget.whiteLabelHint: Custom logo & accent colour. Platform branding remains visible.
widget.embedReady: Your store is approved — paste this single line just before </body> on your site.
widget.embedNotReady: The embed unlocks once your store is active and you've created a widget-scoped API key.
widget.embedKeyHint: Replace YOUR_WIDGET_KEY with a widget-scoped key from the API keys page.
widget.configHint: These settings apply to your storefront widget.
widget.previewHint: How your launcher looks on your storefront with these settings.
widget.previewGreetingFallback: Hi! How can I help you find a product?

keys.intro: Scoped, least-privilege keys connect your store and widget to Vitrin.
keys.newKeyNotice: New key (copy it now — it won't be shown again):
keys.label: Label
keys.empty: No API keys yet — create a sync key to import your catalogue, or a widget key for your storefront.

team.intro: Invite staff to help manage your store. Staff have reduced privileges.
team.inviteCreated: Invitation created. Share this setup link (dev mode):
team.name: Name

credits.intro: AI credits power search, the assistant, and analytics.

activity.intro: Recent actions on your store account.

settings.trackingHint: Controls whether shopper behaviour is captured for analytics (GDPR).
settings.privacyHint: Export your tenant's portable data, or permanently erase all shopper data.
settings.erasePrompt: This erases ALL shopper data (leads, chat memory, events, index). Type your store slug "{slug}" to confirm.
settings.erased: Your store data has been erased.
settings.eraseFailed: Erase failed — confirmation did not match.
settings.changePwHint: For better security, choose a strong, unique password.
settings.changeEmailHint: Enter your password and a new email. We will send a verification link to the new address.
settings.emailChanged: Email changed. Check your new inbox to verify it.
